ExportedFolder.Name: V7a 商客奇谭 v0.1.0（在玩无攻略 不用等

Trigger.Name: 团灭中断动作 + 重置战斗

Action.UseTTSTextExpression: ${?d: B9CE = 先钢铁，分散, B9CF = 先月环，分散, B9D0 = 先钢铁，分摊, B9D1 = 先月环，分摊 [${aid}]}

Action.Description: 以第一组倒计时 5 的结束时间计算 t

Action.NamedCallbackParam: Tag: V7a1_Quad Omen: Fan90 delay: 1.2 t: 4.5 Pos: ${x}, ${y}, ${z} Angle: ${h} Scale: 60, 60, 1 --- Tag: V7a1_Quad Omen: Fan90 delay: 1.2 t: 4.5 Pos: ${x}, ${y}, ${z} Angle: ${h} + π Scale: 60, 60, 1 --- Tag: V7a1_Quad Omen: Fan90 delay: 5.7 t: 3.0 Pos: ${x}, ${y}, ${z} Angle: ${h} + π/2 Scale: 60, 60, 1 --- Tag: V7a1_Quad Omen: Fan90 delay: 5.7 t: 3.0 Pos: ${x}, ${y}, ${z} Angle: ${h} - π/2 Scale: 60, 60, 1

Action.Description: 只看攻击前三行的三个小怪

Action.LogMessageText: V7a1_家臣3:马:${v:V7a1_家臣3_马安全区}:龟:${v:V7a1_家臣3_龟安全区}:蟹:${v:V7a1_家臣3_蟹安全区}

Action.Description: 与第二轮储存的每一项对比，匹配的生成 omen
只看攻击前三行的三个小怪

Action.NamedCallbackParam: Action: Circle O: ${env:X0}, ${env:Y0}, ${env:Z0} R: 18 R2: 100 Waymarks: A1D4C3B2

Action.UseTTSTextExpression: 小怪1，去${?l: 左上, 左下, 右下, 右上 [${!v:V7a1_家臣1_myDirN4} + 1]}
${if: ${!v:V7a1_Quad_b打主斜} ? 去右上、左下 : 去左上、右下 }

Action.Description: 马/蟹：列记录内外（同组只可能是 15/24），行记录偏北/偏南（同组只可能是 14/25）

Action.LogMessageText: _V7a1_家臣1:b鸟在南北:${!v:V7a1_家臣1_b鸟在南北}:b马列靠内:${!v:V7a1_家臣1_b马列靠内}:b马行靠上:${!v:V7a1_家臣1_b马行靠上}

Trigger.Name: 2. 处理小怪
Trigger.RegularExpression: ^_V7a1_家臣1:b鸟在南北:(?<b鸟在南北>[01]):b马列靠内:(?<b马列靠内>[01]):b马行靠上:(?<b马行靠上>[01])

Action.VariableExpression: ${if: ${b鸟在南北} ? 左右边 : 上下边 }
${if: !${b鸟在南北} ? 左右边 : 上下边 }

Trigger.Name: 4.1a 标点（近战）
Trigger.RegularExpression: ^V7a1_家臣1:dirN4:(?<dirN4>[0-3]):n:(?<n>[1-4]):type:(?<type>[马蟹鸟鲀]):安全区:(?<safe>内|角|上下边|左右边)

Action.LogMessageText: V7a1_家臣1:dirN4:${v:V7a1_家臣1_myDirN4}:n:${!l:V7a1_家臣1_顺序.size}:type:${!v:tmp_type}:安全区:${!v:V7a1_家臣1_${!v:tmp_type}安全区}

Trigger.Name: 4.1b 标点（远程）
Trigger.RegularExpression: ^V7a1_家臣1:dirN4:(?<dirN4>[0-3]):n:(?<n>[1-4]):type:(?<type>[马蟹鸟鲀]):安全区:(?<safe>内|角|上下边|左右边)

Action.LogMessageText: V7a1_指令2_点名:b点名:${v:V7a1_指令2_b点名}:b高:${v:V7a1_指令2_b高}

Action.UseTTSTextExpression: ${if: ${b高} = (${!v:myIdx} <= 2) ? 去 : 换到 }${if: ${b高} ? 壹组 : 贰组 }
${if: ${b高} = (${!v:myIdx} <= 2) ? 去 : 换到 }${if: ${b高} ? 壹组 : 贰组 }

Action.LogMessageText: V7a1_指令1_点名:b点名:${v:V7a1_指令1_b点名}:b高:${v:V7a1_指令1_b高}

Action.DictVariableValue: _=咬击古狼闪 | tts=半场刀 | omen=Rect | t=4.7 | Scale=40,80,1

Action.Description: [Flags] 东 = 1, 西 = 2, 南 = 4, 北 = 8
